JetBrains perks

>diff --git a/documentation/content/en/articles/committers-guide/_index.adoc b/documentation/content/en/articles/committers-guide/_index.adoc
>index 517ecee405..713dad92e1 100644
>--- a/documentation/content/en/articles/committers-guide/_index.adoc

>+=== `JetBrains`

>+https://www.jetbrains.com[JetBrains] software development company which makes tools for software developers and project managers. The company offers many integrated development environments (IDEs) for different programming languages.

"is a" missing.
